title: hieracium murorum subsp. insuccatum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. insuccatum is a subspecies of plant belonging to the dandelion genus, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and slender stem. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues due to its high content of bitter compounds. Its health benefits include acting as a natural diuretic, aiding in the removal of excess fluids from the body, and potentially helping to lower blood pressure. Hieracium murorum subsp. insuccatum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
